_comment: NowcastIQ Agent — Task Generation Rules. Edit this file to change agent behaviour without touching code. Agent reads this on every run. See RULES_GUIDE.md for full documentation.

callForDemo.description: Call T1/T2/T3 trialists within 72h of trial start

midPointCheck.description: Check in with T1/T2/T3 trialists at day 7

feedbackAndPricing.description: Call all trialists 72h before trial end for feedback and pricing
feedbackAndPricing.note: applies to ALL trials in lists 3.0 and 3.1 regardless of tier

finalCheckIn.description: Final push in last 48h of trial

escalation.description: Escalate open trial tasks with no response after this many days

closingSoon.description: Alert when deal closes within this many days

newsletter.note: Owner is always Naseef for B1. This cannot be changed.

universal.description: Create re-engage task if no team outreach to lead in this many days
